game_name: Earth 2150: Escape from the Blue Planet

sub_pixel_system.notes: Not applicable - RTS game with unit-based movement, not character physics

special_mechanics.name: Unit Movement
special_mechanics.description: RTS-based movement system with units (ground vehicles, ships, aircraft) controlled via waypoint commands. No jump/platforming mechanics. Units follow direct paths unless manually commanded.

special_mechanics.name: Unit Leveling & Customization
special_mechanics.description: Units can gain levels and be customized by choosing chassis, weapons, and equipment. Commands can be customized (standard RTS vs extended set with hold area and retreat orders).

tier_notes: Tier 3 - RTS game without character-based physics. Source material (Wikipedia) contains no movement parameters, gravity, or jump physics as these mechanics do not apply to this game genre. All physics values are null as the game uses unit pathfinding and command-based movement rather than physics simulation.
